title: Lips Up – Preview lip filler on your own face
abstract:
My wife wanted lip filler but wasn't sure how it would actually look on her face. Existing AI tools either changed her identity or produced unrealistic results, so I built Lips Up.

Upload a selfie and get a realistic preview of different lip filler styles before booking an appointment.

Woul
